title: Minky VT86693F10 Sure Grip Jumbo Pegs, Multi-Colour, Pack of 12
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Ideal for holding towels, bedding, curtains etc
Firm but gentle grip to reduce peg marks on your fabrics
description: From the manufacturer Minky Homecare Established in the UK in 1941, Minky Homecare are world leaders in laundry hardware and textile manufacture. Minky is the UK’s most loved brand in the laundry market, with Minky ironing boards and covers found in over 70% of UK homes. We are the proud holders of both the Royal Warrant, granted as supplier of premium quality products to the Royal Household, and the Princes Warrant, awarded for product excellence and a commitment to the environment. Firm but gentle Wide, soft grip jaws with anti-marking pads Soft grip finger pads Strong weatherproof spring Sure Grip Jumbo Pegs - Pack of 12 The Sure Grip extra-large Jumbo Pegs are ideal for drying heavier, bulky items such as duvets, towels and curtains etc. As part of the new Sure Grip range, they have a firm but gentle grip to reduce peg marks on your fabrics whilst securely holding them in place. These super-sized pegs have rust resistant coil springs making them strong and weatherproof, ensuring their longevity. Minky Sure Grip Range The Sure Grip Range from Minky features many other innovative home products: Sure Grip Pegs Sure Grip Jumbo Pegs Sure Grip Peg Pod and Pegs Sure Grip Iron Holder
